metadata.description: Tableau -> Microsoft Fabric / Power BI migration skill for code-executing Copilots (GitHub Copilot CLI, Claude Code, Cursor)

plugins.name: tableau-migration
plugins.description: Rebuild Tableau datasources as Microsoft Fabric / Power BI semantic models: typed TMDL, inferred relationships, deterministic calc -> DAX (preserving every original formula), storage-mode auto-selection, and a self-contained Fabric REST deploy.
